name: octo-oke-autoscaling-stress-audit
description: Stress-run audit lines emitted by the shop application. Filtered to records where run_id is not null so the dashboard surfaces only stress-demo lifecycle events (scenario_start / scenario_end / threshold breaches). run_id is the cross-channel pivot key that joins this view to the Monitoring alarms (plan 08), APM saved queries (plan 07), and the stress runner (plan 05).
queryString: 'Log Source' = 'octo-shop-app-json' and run_id is not null | stats count() by status, scenario, run_id | sort -Time
